assessment.note: Names missing pairing as the thing that would prevent getting stuck silently, which signals current friction and support gaps; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] pairing once or twice a week is a concrete support thread to pick up next session.

new_queue.label: Support cadence
new_queue.name: What kind of check-in from me would be most useful over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Helps line up a lightweight support rhythm without over-managing.

new_queue.label: Two-week takeaway
new_queue.name: What do you want to focus on most over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete commitment for the next two weeks.
